phase1.explanation:
🤖 **Full implementation brings your app to life.**

**Implementation steps:**

| Step | Activity |
|------|----------|
| 1 | Set up database |
| 2 | Create repository |
| 3 | Implement use cases |
| 4 | Build ViewModels |
| 5 | Create UI |
| 6 | Add navigation |
| 7 | Test |

**Kotlin-chan says:**
"Implementation is where planning becomes reality."

**Best practices:**
1. Build incrementally
2. Test as you go
3. Use version control
4. Write clean code
5. Document

phase2.errorMessage:
1. Crashes
2. Poor UX
3. Bugs
4. Hard to maintain
5. Lost work
6. Poor quality
